description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and several medium-sized trees, providing a sense of privacy and natural beauty. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway that leads from the adjacent street, and the property is bordered by a low wall or fence. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof and paved areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees and paved walkways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the main entrance, walkway, and two trees flanking the entry path.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the bungalow, highlighting the driveway, additional greenery, and the side entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the bungalow, with a clear view of the backyard, more trees, and the back facade.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side of the bungalow, featuring the side yard, additional trees, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
